description_long: A young adult woman stands upright, dressed in a short, fitted dress with a high collar and short sleeves. Her right arm and hand are stylized with a mechanical or prosthetic appearance, featuring a red, segmented design, while her left arm is natural and tattooed. She wears sheer tights and high-heeled shoes, and fingerless gloves on both hands. Her hair is styled in a high, spiky ponytail, and she has a headset or earpiece on her head. A small pouch or holster is attached to her right thigh, suggesting a functional or urban accessory.
description: A young woman in a short dress with a mechanical right arm, tattooed left arm, high ponytail, and high heels, accessorized with gloves and a thigh pouch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mechanical right arm, tattooed left arm, fitted dress, gloves, and high ponytail clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tattooed arm, the profile of the dress, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the dress, the ponytail, and the symmetrical stance of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the mechanical arm, the holster on the thigh, and the side profile of the head and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short fitted dress with high collar, sheer tights, fingerless gloves, and a thigh holster
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high, spiky ponytail
